channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ryan Callinan's Family Home in Merewether Goes to Auction
item.description: The long-time family home of Newcastle-born professional surfer Ryan Callinan has been listed for auction in the beachside suburb of Merewether. Situated at 20 Ranclaud Street, the property has three ...

item.title: PM Modi and Lankan President Dissanayake discuss impact of West Asia conflict on energy security
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Sri Lankan President Anura Kumara Dissanayake held talks on March 24, 2026, to discuss the fallout of the ongoing West Asia conflict. The main focus was the disruption...

item.title: Understanding Sleep: How Much Rest Do We Truly Need?
item.description: While society often glorifies eight hours of nightly sleep as essential for optimal health, research shows the reality is more nuanced. Chronic sleep deprivation can have serious long-term consequence...

item.title: Minnesota Files Lawsuit Against Trump Administration Seeking Evidence from Federal Agent Shootings During Immigration Enforcement Operation
item.description: The state of Minnesota, through its Attorney General Keith Ellison, the Hennepin County Attorney’s Office, and the Minnesota Bureau of Criminal Apprehension, filed a lawsuit in Washington, D.C., again...

item.title: How Lady Day on 25 March marked the New Year in England and Wales until 1752
item.description: For over 600 years, from 1155 until 1752, the new year in England and Wales began not on 1 January but on 25 March, known as Lady Day or the Feast of the Annunciation. This date served as one of the t...

item.title: Harambee Starlets to Host FIFA Women's Series, Facing Australia, India, and Malawi in Nairobi
item.description: Kenya is set to host top-tier women's football action next month as Harambee Starlets will feature in the upcoming FIFA Women's Series. The Kenyan women’s team will play their matches at Nyayo Nationa...

item.title: Letter calls for greater transparency on funding sources for Australian think tanks
item.description: A letter to the editor published in The Canberra Times highlights concerns over the funding and influence of Australian think tanks. The writer notes that the federal government provides around $40 mi...

item.title: Safe Tips for Using Red Light Therapy Caps on Color-Treated or Damaged Hair
item.description: Red light therapy caps provide a non-invasive option for supporting hair growth in people with color-treated, bleached, or chemically damaged hair. These devices use specific wavelengths of light to s...

item.title: AI-Generated Video Falsely Claims Rising Rice Prices to P300 per Kilo
item.description: Rappler debunked a viral video spreading on Facebook that falsely claimed rice prices in the Philippines would soar to P300 per kilo starting April 1, 2026. The video, originally shared by 'Lingkod Ba...

item.title: DSWD reminds public not to fall for fake fuel assistance messages
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) has issued a warning to the public about fake online applications claiming to offer fuel assistance. According to an advisory on its official Fa...

item.title: Power Minister Apologises for Electricity Outages, Promises Improvement Soon
item.description: The Minister of Power, Bayo Adelabu, don come out to apologise to Nigerians over the wahala wey dey happen with electricity supply and the constant outages wey dey disturb businesses, schools, and ind...

item.title: MCT Announces 16th EJAT Awards on May 29 with New Categories for Media Houses and Focus on Tech and Analytical Journalism
item.description: The Executive Secretary of the Media Council of Tanzania (MCT), Mr. Ernest Sungura, has revealed exciting plans for the 16th Edition of the Excellence in Journalism Awards Tanzania (EJAT). The event i...

item.title: Minnesota seeks court order for evidence access in state probe of federal officer shootings during immigration enforcement
item.description: Minnesota officials, including Hennepin County Attorney Mary Moriarty, filed a lawsuit against the Trump administration on Tuesday, demanding access to evidence related to three shootings involving fe...

item.title: University Committee Proposes Syllabus Changes in Jammu Amid Protests Against Inclusion of Jinnah and Muslim Thinkers
item.description: A committee at the University of Jammu in Indian-administered Kashmir has suggested removing content related to Quaid-i-Azam Muhammad Ali Jinnah, Allama Iqbal, and Sir Syed Ahmad Khan from the MA Poli...

item.title: Challenges in Tanzania’s Dairy Sector Limit Local Milk Supply Despite Large Herds
item.description: Tanzania get big number ya livestock, lakini bado inabidi ile milk nyingi ije kutoka nje. Experts wanasema si kwamba milk haipatikani, bali kuna problem ya quality, infrastructure na market organisati...

item.title: Delhi Court Sentences Kashmiri Separatist Leader Asiya Andrabi to Life Imprisonment
item.description: On Tuesday, a Delhi court handed down a life imprisonment sentence to Kashmiri separatist leader Asiya Andrabi, who is alleged to be the founder and chief of the banned all-women separatist group Dukh...

item.title: Cebu Pacific adjusts flights amid rising global fuel costs
item.description: Cebu Pacific, the Philippines’ leading airline, has announced cancellations and reductions of several overseas flights in response to a sharp increase in global fuel prices, which have more than doubl...

item.title: Tezgam Express derails near Lodhran injuring 25 passengers, eight critical, track blocked
item.description: A late-night derailment of the Tezgam Express train occurred near Adam Wahan close to Lodhran on Tuesday night. The Karachi-bound train from Peshawar had at least four coaches jump the tracks, with so...

item.title: 12 Senior SAPS Officers Arrested for Alleged Involvement in Corruption Linked to ‘Cat’ Matlala’s Company
item.description: In a significant development, twelve senior South African Police Service (SAPS) officers have been arrested for their alleged involvement in an irregular tender that was awarded to the company Medicar...

item.title: Mohamed Salah set to depart Liverpool after nine successful seasons
item.description: Liverpool have confirmed that Mohamed Salah will leave the club at the end of the 2025-26 season, bringing an end to an illustrious nine-year stint at Anfield. The 33-year-old Egyptian forward joined ...
